facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this seafood spot. Their loss. Blue Seafood restaurant on Đường Nguyễn Trãi pulls a 4.7 from 916 reviews and the crowd inside is almost entirely local. That's the only signal you need. Fresh catch, no resort markup, real Phu Quoc plates. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch what lands on the table at Blue Seafood. Locals fill this place every night for a reason. 4.7 stars, 916 reviews, zero tourist trap energy. Đường Nguyễn Trãi, Khu 1. Go.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about Blue Seafood. 4.7 stars, 916 reviews, mostly locals inside. Đường Nguyễn Trãi. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: The seafood spot locals actually eat at. 916 reviews at 4.7. No tourists. No gimmicks.

tiktok.caption: 916 locals can't be wrong. Blue Seafood, Phu Quoc. Go before everyone finds it. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel
